file_name: Questionnaire - Maas – 50pct acquisition of COLAS’ Caloundra asphalt plant and 100pct of COLAS’ Tomago asphalt plant - March 2026.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Maas (including Regional Group Australia, Asphalt Operators Australia and Austek Roads) and COLAS (including SAMI Bitumen Technologies and/or the Tomago or Caloundra hot-mix asphalt plants) are close competitors and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Maas (including Regional Group Australia, Asphalt Operators Australia and Austek Roads) and COLAS (including SAMI Bitumen Technologies) and/or the Tomago or Caloundra hot-mix asphalt plants.
